title: Use 32px left and right safe margin for main page content
applies_to: Page shells content containers app frames
requirement: The left and right safe margin between the page edge and the main content area must be 32px
preferred_pattern: Apply this rule at the shared page container or layout shell when possible
anti_pattern: Do not hard-code multiple local px-8 or px-[32px] replacements across many pages
notes: Use the shared page wrapper as the first choice

title: Use Tailwind px-8 for safe margin
requirement: Represent the 32px safe margin through the shared page wrapper consuming px-8
preferred_pattern: Define or reuse the shared layout token and consume it in the page container
anti_pattern: Do not duplicate literal safe-margin values in disconnected stylesheets
notes: Matches foundation spacing scale

title: Prefer shared page wrappers for consistent edge spacing
requirement: Prefer shared page wrappers for consistent edge spacing across screens
preferred_pattern: Normalize the wrapper instead of patching every page in isolation
anti_pattern: Do not scatter local padding fixes when a common shell can enforce the same rule
notes: Important for scale and maintainability

title: Keep narrow viewport behavior explicit
requirement: Keep mobile or narrow viewport behavior explicit and follow the design system's compact safe margin if it exists
preferred_pattern: Implement responsive behavior in the shared shell or note the fallback assumption
anti_pattern: Do not accidentally lock small screens to an unusable desktop gutter
notes: If no compact rule exists preserve usability and document the assumption

title: Remove duplicated horizontal padding from nested legacy containers
requirement: When legacy screens nest multiple containers remove duplicated horizontal padding where safe so the effective margin remains correct
preferred_pattern: Simplify nested wrappers to a single effective safe margin
anti_pattern: Do not keep stacked horizontal padding that doubles the visual gutter
notes: Audit nested containers during refactors

title: Use bg-gray-50 for global page background
requirement: Global page background should use bg-gray-50 (#F5F6F8)
preferred_pattern: Apply bg-gray-50 to the page root or main container
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary background colors or hard-coded values
notes: Applies to all page backgrounds

title: Fix top navigation height to 48px with responsive width
requirement: Top navigation height should be fixed at 48px with responsive width
preferred_pattern: Set height explicitly to 48px and width to responsive
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary or inherited navigation heights
notes: Applies to all top navigation components

title: Use bg-white and rounded-lg for content cards
requirement: Content cards should use bg-white for background and rounded-lg for border radius
preferred_pattern: Apply color-bg-1 and radius-lg to card components
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary background colors or border radius values
notes: Applies to all content cards

title: Use consistent typography and spacing for card titles
requirement: Card titles should use text-base font-bold (16px/700) with leading-8 (24px), 24px bottom padding; card padding 20px vertical and 24px horizontal
preferred_pattern: Apply font-headline-3 with 16px size 24px line height 700 weight and specified padding values
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary font sizes or padding values for card titles
notes: 20px

title: Implement edit mode toggle with button state management
requirement: Edit button should be on the right side of card title clicking it switches form from read-only to edit mode edit button disappears and save cancel buttons appear
preferred_pattern: Implement state management to toggle between read-only and edit modes with appropriate button visibility
anti_pattern: Do not mix edit mode states or leave buttons in inconsistent states
notes: Applies to pages with editable fields

title: Remove dividers between title and search/form area and between table toolbar and table
requirement: There should be no divider lines between page title and search/form area and between table toolbar and table
preferred_pattern: Remove border-bottom or separator styles between these sections
anti_pattern: Do not add unnecessary divider lines that create visual clutter
notes: Applies to all pages with search areas form areas and tables

title: Use bg-white for search/filter and form areas
requirement: Search area, filter area, form area background should use bg-white (#FFFFFF)
preferred_pattern: Apply color-bg-secondary to search filter form query condition screen search-box filter-box input-area control-area containers
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary background colors for search filter form query condition screen search-box filter-box input-area control-area areas
notes: Applies to all search filter form query condition screen search-box filter-box input-area control-area areas

title: Use space-6 horizontal and space-5 vertical spacing for search/form conditions
requirement: Search conditions and form fields should have 24px (space-6) horizontal spacing and 20px (space-5) vertical spacing
preferred_pattern: Use grid or flex with 24px gap horizontally and 20px gap vertically for search conditions and form fields
anti_pattern: Do not use inconsistent spacing between search conditions or form fields
notes: Applies to all search and form condition layouts

title: Use space-5 (20px) spacing between page title and search/form area
requirement: There should be 20px (space-5) spacing between page title and search/form area
preferred_pattern: Use 20px margin-bottom on title or 20px margin-top on search/form area
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary spacing between page title and search/form area
notes: Applies to all pages with search or form areas

title: Use space-5 vertical and space-6 horizontal padding for cards and collapsible panels
requirement: Card and collapsible panel containers should have 20px (space-5) top/bottom and 24px (space-6) left/right padding
preferred_pattern: Apply padding of 20px top/bottom and 24px left/right to card containers and collapsible panels
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary padding values for cards or collapsible panels
notes: Applies to all content cards and collapsible panels

title: Overview area is a required section in detail pages
requirement: The overview area (detail page header card) is a required section that introduces the page title and basic information
preferred_pattern: Always include the overview area as the first section of a detail page
anti_pattern: Do not omit the overview area or replace it with a non-standard header
notes: Required section; element IDs: 1a

title: Use 40px × 40px for overview icon/avatar size
applies_to: Detail page overview area icon logo avatar
requirement: The icon/logo/avatar in the detail page overview area should be 40px by 40px; supports custom images
preferred_pattern: Set icon/avatar container to 40px × 40px with object-fit cover
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary or oversized icon/avatar dimensions
notes: Optional element (1); supports custom images

title: Title area is required with main title mandatory and subtitle optional
requirement: The title area in the overview is required; main title is mandatory; subtitle is optional; supports tags and favorite feature (max 5); tag content width max 120px
preferred_pattern: Always render the main title; show subtitle only when provided; limit tags to 5 with max-width 120px each
anti_pattern: Do not omit the main title or allow more than 5 tags or tags wider than 120px
notes: Required element (2); supports tags and favorite/bookmark

title: Limit basic info to 6 items with 160px width and 32px spacing
applies_to: Detail page overview basic info area
requirement: Basic info should not exceed 6 items; each item content width should not exceed 160px with ellipsis for overflow; spacing between items should be 32px
preferred_pattern: Use max-width 160px per item with text-overflow ellipsis and 32px gap between items; cap at 6 items
anti_pattern: Do not allow more than 6 basic info items or use inconsistent spacing or let text overflow without ellipsis
notes: Optional element (3); overflow shows ellipsis

title: Use 16px spacing from title and default text color #161E26 for remark area
applies_to: Detail page overview remark area notes links icons
requirement: Remark area should have 16px spacing from the title area; default text color is #161E26; link colors can be #0067D1 or #46515D; supports tags/auxiliary text/help icons/jump links
preferred_pattern: Apply 16px margin-top from title; set default text color to #161E26; use #0067D1 or #46515D for links or secondary text
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary colors or spacing between remark and title area
notes: Optional element (13); supports tags/text/help icons/links

title: Collapse extra function icons into More menu when exceeding 3
applies_to: Detail page overview function area share like more
requirement: Function area icons should collapse into a More menu when exceeding 3 items; can be replaced with a dropdown filter
preferred_pattern: Show up to 3 icons directly; wrap additional icons into a More/dropdown menu
anti_pattern: Do not display more than 3 icons without a More overflow menu
notes: Optional element (4); supports share/like/common actions

title: Content area is a required section supporting single-tab or single-container mode
applies_to: Detail page content area tabs containers
requirement: The content area is required; supports single-tab operation and single-container operation
preferred_pattern: Always include the content area with either tab-based or container-based layout
anti_pattern: Do not omit the content area or mix incompatible layout modes
notes: Required section; element IDs: 2a

title: Tab container is required with element 10 following by default
requirement: Tab container is required; element 5 (horizontal tabs) can be hidden; element 10 (horizontal tab buttons) follows by default; can configure containers and cards below
preferred_pattern: Always render tab container; show element 10 buttons by default; allow element 5 to be hidden
anti_pattern: Do not omit tab container or break element 10 default following behavior
notes: Required element (2a); element 5 optional hideable; element 10 follows

title: Left tree slot defaults to vertical tabs with 3-level max depth
applies_to: Detail page content left tree slot vertical tabs
requirement: Left tree slot defaults to vertical tab style; element 9 (left tab buttons) follows by default; clicking switches right content area; text overflow shows ellipsis; max 3 levels recommended; supports custom style replacement
preferred_pattern: Use vertical tabs with max 3 nesting levels; show ellipsis for text overflow; enable right content area switching
anti_pattern: Do not allow more than 3 nesting levels or let text overflow without ellipsis
notes: Optional element (2e); element 9 follows by default

title: Collapse panel container is required with elements 6 and 7 following
applies_to: Detail page content collapse panel container
requirement: Collapse panel container is required; supports expand/collapse; elements 6 (collapse title) and 7 (collapse buttons) follow by default
preferred_pattern: Always render collapse panel container with expand/collapse behavior; show element 6 and 7 by default
anti_pattern: Do not omit collapse panel container or hide elements 6 and 7 without reason
notes: Required element (2b); elements 6 and 7 follow by default

title: Collapse panel inner slot supports adding components or nested containers
applies_to: Detail page content collapse panel slot
requirement: Collapse panel container slot can add components (forms tables etc.) or nested collapse panel containers
preferred_pattern: Use the slot to render forms/tables or recursively nest collapse panel containers
anti_pattern: Do not place non-component elements directly in the slot without wrapping
notes: Optional element (2c); supports recursive nesting

title: Custom slot supports cards or containers with style reference
applies_to: Detail page content custom slot card container
requirement: Custom slot can render cards (refer to homepage card component specs) or containers (progress bar collapse panel); container behavior matches 2a and 2b specs
preferred_pattern: Render cards using homepage card component styles or containers following 2a/2b interaction rules
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary card styles that deviate from homepage card component specs
notes: Optional element (2d); cards reference homepage card component

title: Limit horizontal tabs to 10 with max 142px width; multi-level goes to left slot
requirement: Horizontal tabs are single-level only; multi-level tabs go in 2e left vertical slot; max 10 tabs; each tab width max 142px
preferred_pattern: Use max-width 142px per tab with text-overflow ellipsis; limit to 10 tabs; route multi-level tabs to left tree slot
anti_pattern: Do not allow multi-level horizontal tabs or more than 10 tabs or tab width exceeding 142px
notes: Optional element (5); hideable

title: Collapse panel title is required with max 10 characters
applies_to: Detail page collapse panel title arrow
requirement: Collapse panel title is required; expand/collapse arrow follows by default; title should not exceed 10 characters
preferred_pattern: Use text-overflow ellipsis for titles exceeding 10 characters; always show expand/collapse arrow
anti_pattern: Do not omit collapse panel title or allow unbounded title length
notes: Required element (6); arrow follows by default

title: Collapse panel buttons respond to current panel only with primary button on far right
applies_to: Detail page collapse panel buttons edit review
requirement: Collapse panel buttons respond only to the current panel; supports business-specific buttons like single-module edit or pre-review; primary button on the far right
preferred_pattern: Scope button actions to the current panel only; place primary button at the far right
anti_pattern: Do not let collapse buttons affect other panels or place primary button in non-rightmost position
notes: Optional element (7); supports business-specific button additions

title: Standard template provides form component with flow layout
requirement: Standard template provides form component with flow layout; can be replaced via 2d custom slot (refer to 2d specs)
preferred_pattern: Use standard form component with flow layout; swap via 2d slot for custom styles
anti_pattern: Do not use non-flow layouts for standard form or deviate from 2d replacement rules
notes: Optional element (8); replaceable via 2d slot

title: Left tree tab buttons at page bottom non-floating with primary on far right
applies_to: Detail page left tree slot buttons
requirement: Left tree tab buttons act on 2e left tree slot layer; positioned at page bottom; non-floating; hideable; clicking refreshes current page or opens new page; supports adding buttons; primary on far right
preferred_pattern: Place buttons at page bottom without floating; scope click actions to page refresh or new page navigation; primary button on far right
anti_pattern: Do not float left tree buttons or let them affect non-tree layers
notes: Optional element (9); hideable

title: Horizontal tab buttons float when content exceeds one screen
applies_to: Detail page tab container buttons floating
requirement: Horizontal tab buttons act on 2a tab container layer; positioned at tab container bottom; float when page content exceeds one screen; hideable; clicking refreshes page or navigates in-page; primary on far right
preferred_pattern: Float buttons only when content exceeds viewport; hide when not needed; primary button on far right
anti_pattern: Do not float buttons when content fits within one screen or hide primary button from rightmost position
notes: Optional element (10); hideable; floats on scroll overflow

title: Divider is required between content containers
applies_to: Detail page content area container divider separator
requirement: A divider line must be added between two content containers by default
preferred_pattern: Render a divider/separator between adjacent content containers
anti_pattern: Do not omit dividers between content containers without explicit reason
notes: Required element (14)

title: Bottom action bar check prompt slot is optional
applies_to: Detail page bottom action bar check prompt
requirement: Check item prompt slot supports checkbox text link and expand-more; placed before buttons in the bottom action bar
preferred_pattern: Render check prompt with checkbox/link/expand-more as needed before the action buttons
anti_pattern: Do not place check prompt after buttons or outside the bottom action bar
notes: Optional element (3a); supports checkbox/text-link/expand-more

title: Page-level floating action buttons with max 7 visible and More overflow
applies_to: Detail page bottom action bar buttons floating more
requirement: Page-level buttons are required; floating display; clicking refreshes current page or opens new page; max 7 visible; extras collapse into More; supports button groups; primary on far right
preferred_pattern: Show up to 7 buttons directly; wrap additional into More overflow; float at bottom; primary button on far right
anti_pattern: Do not show more than 7 buttons or place primary button in non-rightmost position or remove floating behavior
notes: Required element (12); supports button groups

title: Enforce strict three-layer container nesting structure
applies_to: Detail page container nesting structure layout
requirement: Page structure must follow three layers: Layer 1 (top-level container) defines skeleton and navigation; Layer 2 (content container) organizes content blocks; Layer 3 (content unit) holds final text/images/interactions
preferred_pattern: Always nest containers in Layer1 > Layer2 > Layer3 order; never skip layers or add extra levels
anti_pattern: Do not skip nesting layers or add a 4th level or nest Layer 3 containers back into Layer 1
notes: Three-layer strict structure

title: Layer 1 top-level containers include tab/collapse/horizontal-nav containers
applies_to: Detail page nesting layer 1 top-level container types
requirement: Layer 1 top-level container types: tab container
preferred_pattern: collapse panel container
anti_pattern: horizontal navigation container
notes: split container
column13: Use only the defined container types at Layer 1
column14: Do not use undefined container types at the top level
column16: tab container,collapse panel container,horizontal nav container,tree container,tree menu container,split container
column17: Layer 1 defines page skeleton and navigation mode

title: Layer 2 content container types include tab/collapse/tree/title/multi-column containers
applies_to: Detail page nesting layer 2 content container types
requirement: Layer 2 content container types: tab container
preferred_pattern: collapse panel container
anti_pattern: tree container
notes: multi-column container
column14: Use only the defined container types at Layer 2
column15: Do not use undefined container types at Layer 2
column17: tab container,collapse panel container,tree container,tree menu container,title container,multi-column container,horizontal nav container

title: Layer 3 content unit types include multi-column/collapse/tab/title containers
applies_to: Detail page nesting layer 3 content unit types
requirement: Layer 3 content unit types: multi-column container
preferred_pattern: collapse panel container
anti_pattern: tab container
default_value: Use only the defined container types at Layer 3
notes: Do not use undefined container types at Layer 3
column14: multi-column container,collapse panel container,tab container,title container

title: Allowed nesting combinations for tab container (Layer 1)
applies_to: Detail page nesting rules tab container combinations
requirement: Tab container (Layer 1) allows: tab>tab>multi-column/collapse-panel; tab>collapse-panel>title/multi-column; tab>tree>collapse-panel/multi-column; tab>tree-menu>collapse-panel/multi-column; tab>title>multi-column; tab>multi-column>title; tab>horizontal-nav>collapse-panel
preferred_pattern: Only use the defined combinations when tab container is at Layer 1
anti_pattern: Do not pair tab container (Layer 1) with undefined Layer 2 or Layer 3 combinations
notes: See 4.1 container rules quick reference table

title: Allowed nesting combinations for collapse panel container (Layer 1)
applies_to: Detail page nesting rules collapse panel combinations
requirement: Collapse panel container (Layer 1) allows: collapse>tab>title/multi-column; collapse>tree>title/multi-column; collapse>title>multi-column; collapse>multi-column>title
preferred_pattern: Only use the defined combinations when collapse panel container is at Layer 1
anti_pattern: Do not pair collapse panel container (Layer 1) with undefined Layer 2 or Layer 3 combinations
notes: See 4.1 container rules quick reference table

title: Allowed nesting combinations for horizontal nav container (Layer 1)
applies_to: Detail page nesting rules horizontal nav combinations
requirement: Horizontal nav container (Layer 1) allows: nav>collapse>title/multi-column; nav>tree>collapse-panel; nav>tree-menu>collapse-panel; nav>multi-column>title
preferred_pattern: Only use the defined combinations when horizontal nav container is at Layer 1
anti_pattern: Do not pair horizontal nav container (Layer 1) with undefined Layer 2 or Layer 3 combinations
notes: See 4.1 container rules quick reference table

title: Allowed nesting combinations for tree container (Layer 1)
applies_to: Detail page nesting rules tree container combinations
requirement: Tree container (Layer 1) allows: tree>collapse-panel>tab-container; tree>tab>collapse-panel
preferred_pattern: Only use the defined combinations when tree container is at Layer 1
anti_pattern: Do not pair tree container (Layer 1) with undefined Layer 2 or Layer 3 combinations
notes: See 4.1 container rules quick reference table

title: Allowed nesting combinations for tree menu container (Layer 1)
applies_to: Detail page nesting rules tree menu container combinations
requirement: Tree menu container (Layer 1) allows: tree-menu>tab>collapse-panel; tree-menu>collapse-panel>title
preferred_pattern: Only use the defined combinations when tree menu container is at Layer 1
anti_pattern: Do not pair tree menu container (Layer 1) with undefined Layer 2 or Layer 3 combinations
notes: See 4.1 container rules quick reference table

title: Allowed nesting combinations for split container (Layer 1)
applies_to: Detail page nesting rules split container combinations
requirement: Split container (Layer 1) allows: split>collapse-panel>title; split>title>(no Layer 3)
preferred_pattern: Only use the defined combinations when split container is at Layer 1
anti_pattern: Do not pair split container (Layer 1) with undefined Layer 2 or Layer 3 combinations
notes: See 4.1 container rules quick reference table

title: Modal create page must have three vertical sections
requirement: Modal create/edit pages must be divided into three vertical sections: top header area
preferred_pattern: middle content area
anti_pattern: and bottom footer bar
notes: and fixed footer at bottom
column13: Do not flatten the modal into a single undivided area or omit any of the three sections
column16: Applies to all modal-level create/edit pages

title: Modal header area is required with business title and close button
requirement: Modal header is required; contains business title (e.g. Create Payment Order) to confirm operation context and a close button at top-right to exit modal
preferred_pattern: Always render business title and close button in modal header; close button at top-right corner
anti_pattern: Do not omit the header or remove the close button from the modal
notes: Required element; close button at top-right

title: Modal content area is required with form controls and upload components
requirement: Modal content area is required; contains form controls (text input dropdown date picker etc.)
preferred_pattern: upload/download components with preview
anti_pattern: and hint information (field descriptions
notes: Render form controls and upload components in scrollable content area; mark required fields with asterisk and show format hints
column13: Do not put form controls outside content area or skip required field markers and format hints
column16: Required element; supports text input/dropdown/date picker/upload/download/hints

title: Modal footer bar is required and fixed at bottom
requirement: Modal footer bar is required and fixed at bottom; background color should differ from content area for visual separation; contains global action buttons: submit/confirm (highlighted)
preferred_pattern: save draft (secondary)
anti_pattern: cancel (low highlight)
default_value: Do not make footer scrollable with content or remove any of the three standard button types
column14: Required element; fixed at bottom with visual separation

title: Page-level create pages require breadcrumb navigation
requirement: Page-level create pages must include breadcrumb navigation at top-left showing hierarchy path (e.g. Home > Workbench > List) with click-to-go-back support
preferred_pattern: Render breadcrumb at page top-left with clickable path segments
anti_pattern: Do not omit breadcrumb or make breadcrumb non-interactive
notes: Required for page-level; supports click-to-navigate-back

title: Page-level create pages require clear module title
requirement: Page-level create pages must display a clear module name as page title
preferred_pattern: Show a descriptive page title indicating the current module
anti_pattern: Do not omit the page title or use ambiguous naming
notes: Required for page-level

title: Page-level create pages include filter area and data list/table
requirement: Page-level create pages include: filter area at top with search and filter conditions; data list/table as core area with pagination
preferred_pattern: sorting
anti_pattern: and column configuration; quick action buttons (create
notes: Render filter area above the list/table; place quick actions (new/import/export) near the filter or table header; enable pagination and sorting
column13: Do not remove filter area or quick action buttons or disable pagination

title: Page-level footer includes pagination and record count
requirement: Page-level footer includes pagination controls (page number jump
preferred_pattern: page size setting) and statistics showing total record count under current filter
anti_pattern: Render pagination at page bottom with page size selector and total record count display

title: Single-page mode for forms with few fields fitting within 1-2 screen heights
requirement: Single-page mode applies when form fields are few and fit within 1-2 screen heights; complete all input on one page without steps
preferred_pattern: Render all form fields on a single scrollable page when data volume is low
anti_pattern: Do not force step-based layout when form fits on one page
notes: Applies when field count is low and data fits 1-2 screens

title: Step mode for forms with heavy data or field dependencies
applies_to: Create page form step layout mode
requirement: Step mode applies when form fields are many (exceeding 2 screen heights) or fields have front-to-back dependencies requiring partial validation before continuing; divide into steps for progressive entry
preferred_pattern: Split form into logical steps; validate current step before allowing next; support step navigation
anti_pattern: Do not use single-page layout for heavy forms or skip intermediate validation when fields have dependencies
notes: Applies when field count is high or fields have sequential dependencies

title: Required fields must be marked with red asterisk on the left of label
requirement: Required form fields must have a red asterisk (*) marker on the left side of the field label
preferred_pattern: Place red asterisk before field label text for all required fields
anti_pattern: Do not omit required markers or place them on the right side of the label
notes: Red asterisk only for required fields

title: Primary action button uses blue-purple/deep blue color
requirement: Primary action buttons (submit
preferred_pattern: confirm) should use blue-purple or deep blue color to represent strong-intent actions
anti_pattern: Apply blue-purple/deep blue styling to primary action buttons
notes: blue-purple/deep blue

title: List page consists of filter area and list area
requirement: List page must have two sections: 1) filter area including views and filter conditions; 2) list area for presenting object list
preferred_pattern: Structure the page with filter area on top and list area below
anti_pattern: Do not remove filter area or merge it into the list area without separation
notes: Two core sections: filter + list

title: Filter area includes views and filter conditions
requirement: Filter area must include view switcher and filter conditions; used for narrowing down displayed data
preferred_pattern: Render filter area with view selector and filter condition controls above the list area
anti_pattern: Do not omit filter area or remove view switching capability
notes: Required section; includes views and filter conditions

title: List area presents the object list data
requirement: List area is the core display section for presenting object list data in the configured format (table or card)
preferred_pattern: Render list area below filter area with data in table or card format
anti_pattern: Do not remove list area or place non-list content in this section
notes: Required section; supports table and card formats

title: Use table mode when data volume exceeds 30 items or needs inline editing
requirement: Table mode applies when: data volume is large (over 30 items) requiring one-screen bulk viewing; user needs frequent inline editing and adding without page switching
preferred_pattern: Use table layout when records exceed 30 or inline quick edit is a primary use case
anti_pattern: Do not use table mode for small datasets under 10 items that benefit from visual display
default_value: Applies to high-volume data and inline editing scenarios

title: Use card mode when data volume is small or needs graphical presentation
requirement: Card mode applies when: data volume is small (under 10 items); information needs graphical presentation (products personnel etc.); no inline editing or adding needed on the page
preferred_pattern: Use card layout when records are under 10 or visual/graphical representation is required
anti_pattern: Do not use card mode for large datasets over 30 items or when inline editing is needed
default_value: Applies to low-volume data and visual display scenarios

title: Single-column card layout for small quantity scenarios
requirement: Single-column card layout (one row one column) applies when the number of items is small and each card needs full width display
preferred_pattern: Use one card per row when item count is low and each item benefits from full-width presentation
anti_pattern: Do not force single-column layout when more items need to be visible at once

title: Multi-column card layout for more items with graphical display
requirement: Multi-column card layout (one row multiple columns) applies when more items need to be displayed and graphical presentation is required
preferred_pattern: Use grid-based card layout with multiple cards per row when item count is moderate and visual presentation matters
anti_pattern: Do not use multi-column when items need full-width display or inline editing is required
default_value: For moderate quantity with graphical display needs

title: Approval page uses three-column plus bottom bar composite layout
requirement: Approval page adopts a three-column plus bottom bar composite layout: left panel (common detail area) reuses detail template for order/business info and material details; right panel (approval process area) uses vertical timeline for approval records and process status; bottom bar has custom slot on left and decision buttons on right
preferred_pattern: Structure with left detail panel and right approval panel side by side and fixed bottom bar
anti_pattern: Do not use single-column layout or remove any of the three main areas
notes: Left panel = detail template; Right panel = timeline; Bottom = slot + buttons

title: Approval page header includes logo
requirement: notifications and user avatar
preferred_pattern: Approval page header area
anti_pattern: approval-page,header,navigation,logo,menu,search,notification,avatar
default_value: Render all header elements with logo at top-left and user controls at top-right; page title prominently displayed
notes: Do not omit navigation menu or remove notification/icon controls

title: Header apply info block with max 6 form fields
requirement: Header includes an apply info block showing applicant
preferred_pattern: apply time
anti_pattern: apply type
default_value: Display up to 6 key fields in the apply information block
notes: Do not exceed 6 fields in the header apply info block
column15: Highlights order ID and key status

title: Left panel reuses common detail template with tabs and material table
requirement: Left panel reuses common detail template with: tab navigation (collapsible); basic info area with company/order number/status; material info area with toolbar (import/export/query/search/refresh/settings) and data table with pagination; bottom action area with decision and pre-review buttons
preferred_pattern: Render tabs
anti_pattern: basic info
notes: Do not remove tab navigation or pagination or disable table toolbar operations
column15: Supports multi-level collapsible tabs; table supports sort/filter/batch ops

title: Right panel shows approval process as vertical timeline
applies_to: Approval page right panel approval process
requirement: Right panel displays approval history and current process node as a vertical timeline with: top toggle tabs (approval records / approval progress); filter tabs (all/agreed only/rejected only/transferred only); timeline nodes connected by lines showing flow order
preferred_pattern: Use vertical timeline with nodes connected by lines; support toggle and filter views
anti_pattern: Do not use horizontal layout for approval process or remove timeline connection lines
notes: Default view is approval records

title: Each timeline node contains avatar
requirement: status text
preferred_pattern: timestamp and comments
anti_pattern: Approval page timeline node structure
default_value: Each timeline node contains: role avatar + status icon (agreed/rejected/pending); role name; status text (pending/submitted/rejected/agreed); timestamp; responsible/authorized person info; expandable approval comments
notes: Render all node elements with expand/collapse for comments; use color to distinguish status (green=agreed
column15: Do not omit timestamp or make comments non-expandable
column18: Comments support collapse/expand to avoid info overload

title: Bottom bar left slot for dynamic business fields with text truncation
applies_to: Approval page bottom bar custom slot
requirement: Bottom bar left side has a custom slot area for dynamic business key fields or hints; supports rich text or plain text; overflow text auto-truncated with hover tooltip; max 11 grid characters (622px); background color建议light pink/light gray to distinguish from main interface
preferred_pattern: Render custom slot with text truncation at 622px max width; show full content on hover tooltip; use light background color
anti_pattern: Do not let slot text overflow without truncation or use aggressive background colors
default_value: 11 grid characters max; auto-truncate with hover tips

title: Bottom bar right side has decision buttons with semantic colors
applies_to: Approval page bottom bar decision buttons
requirement: Bottom bar right side contains flow decision buttons: countersign (gray border)
preferred_pattern: transfer review (pink border)
anti_pattern: reject (red border + highlight)
default_value: Render buttons in importance order with approve as rightmost primary; use semantic colors; enforce permission control and mandatory comment for reject
notes: Do not place approve as non-primary or skip permission control for decision buttons
column14: Reject may require mandatory comment input

title: Font sizes: title 18px
requirement: slot hint 12px italic
preferred_pattern: Approval page typography
anti_pattern: approval-page,typography,font-size,title,body,small,italic
default_value: Apply the specified font sizes consistently across the approval page
notes: Do not use arbitrary font sizes or mix up the typography hierarchy

title: Spacing: module gap 24px
requirement: Approval page spacing system
preferred_pattern: approval-page,spacing,module,inner,button,gap,24px,12px,8px
anti_pattern: Spacing rules: 24px between modules; 12px between inner elements within a module; 8px between buttons in a button group
notes: and 8px gap between grouped buttons
column13: Do not use inconsistent spacing or mix up the three spacing levels

title: Border radius: cards/buttons 4px
requirement: Approval page border radius
preferred_pattern: approval-page,border-radius,card,button,input,modal,4px,8px
anti_pattern: Border radius rules: cards and buttons use 4px; input fields use 4px; modals and dialogs use 8px
default_value: Do not mix radius values or apply modal radius to card elements

title: Floating layers and modals use box-shadow 0 2px 8px rgba(0
preferred_pattern: Approval page shadow
anti_pattern: approval-page,shadow,box-shadow,floating,modal,elevation
column14: Apply the specified box-shadow to all floating elements and modals
column15: Do not use heavier shadows or skip elevation on floating layers

title: Mobile hides non-core buttons and keeps critical actions with horizontal scroll for tables
requirement: Responsive rules: hide non-core buttons on mobile while keeping critical operations; tables support horizontal scrolling for compatibility; maintain key approval workflow on small screens
preferred_pattern: Show only critical buttons on mobile; enable horizontal scroll for data tables; ensure approval flow remains usable
anti_pattern: Do not remove critical approval buttons on mobile or prevent table horizontal scrolling
notes: Mobile-first approach for key operations

title: Use icon buttons for table action column
requirement: Table action column must use icon buttons instead of text buttons; each action is represented by a single icon with tooltip on hover; icons should follow a consistent icon library
preferred_pattern: Use icon-only buttons with tooltip for table row actions; group multiple actions with icon-only style; use semantic icon colors (e.g. edit=blue delete=red view=default)
anti_pattern: Do not use text-only buttons or icon+text combination in table action column; do not mix text and icon button styles
notes: Applies to all table action columns across all page types

title: Auto-fit table column widths with horizontal scroll for overflow
requirement: Table columns should auto-fit container width; when total column width exceeds table container add horizontal scrollbar; avoid excessive blank space in columns; set min-width on important columns to prevent compression
preferred_pattern: Use table-layout auto or flex-based layout; enable overflow-x auto on table wrapper; set appropriate min-width per column
anti_pattern: Do not force all columns to fixed narrow widths or leave large blank areas; do not hide overflow content without scrollbar
notes: Applies to all tables across all page types

title: Footer buttons ordered by importance ascending left to right
requirement: Footer action buttons must be ordered from lowest to highest importance left to right with the primary action button placed at the far right; destructive actions (e.g. cancel) should be on the left side
preferred_pattern: Order buttons by ascending importance: lowest importance leftmost and highest importance rightmost as primary with prominent style
anti_pattern: Do not place primary button in non-rightmost position or randomize button order
notes: Primary action button is always rightmost

title: Status tag should be placed to the right of title in header area
requirement: When the page has a header area containing title or other info any status tag or status indicator should be positioned to the right of the title and other header information
preferred_pattern: Place status tag inline with title aligned to the right side of the title text
anti_pattern: Do not place status tag above or below the title or in a separate row
notes: Status tag follows title inline

title: Decision buttons ordered by importance ascending left to right
requirement: Decision buttons must be ordered from lowest to highest importance left to right with the primary approve action button placed at the far right; destructive actions (e.g. reject) should use error/danger style and be placed left of primary
preferred_pattern: Order buttons by ascending importance: lowest importance leftmost and highest importance rightmost as primary with prominent style; destructive actions use error style
anti_pattern: Do not place primary button in non-rightmost position or mix up semantic button colors
notes: Primary approve button is always rightmost; destructive actions use error style

title: Status tag should be placed to the right of title in header area
requirement: When the page has a header area containing title or other info any status tag or status indicator should be positioned to the right of the title and other header information
preferred_pattern: Place status tag inline with title aligned to the right side of the title text
anti_pattern: Do not place status tag above or below the title or in a separate row
notes: Status tag follows title inline

title: Label width 80px for search forms and max 112px with ellipsis for other forms
requirement: In search/query/filter forms label width is fixed at 80px; in all other form modes (create/edit/detail) label max width is 112px with text-overflow ellipsis for longer labels
preferred_pattern: Use fixed 80px label width in search forms; use max-width 112px with text-overflow ellipsis in other form modes
anti_pattern: Do not use inconsistent label widths within the same form mode or let long labels push form layout out of alignment
notes: 112px with ellipsis overflow

title: 20px vertical gap between form rows accounting for 18px default form margin
requirement: Vertical spacing between form rows should be 20px; since form components have a built-in default bottom margin of 18px an additional 2px gap should be applied to achieve the target 20px spacing
preferred_pattern: Apply 20px gap (or 2px extra on top of the 18px default form margin) between form rows
anti_pattern: Do not use inconsistent row spacing or ignore the default 18px form margin when calculating row gap
notes: Target 20px row gap net effect

title: Form fields in editable mode by default
requirement: Form fields in create/edit pages should be in editable mode by default; all form inputs controls and interactive elements must be accessible and editable unless explicitly disabled for specific business logic
preferred_pattern: Set form fields to editable state by default; only disable individual fields when business rules require it
anti_pattern: Do not set entire form or all fields to disabled/readonly state in create/edit pages
notes: Applies to all create and edit page forms

title: Form fields in disabled/read-only mode by default
requirement: Form fields in approval pages and view-only pages should be in disabled/read-only mode by default; all form inputs controls and interactive elements must be non-editable unless explicitly enabled for specific business logic
preferred_pattern: Set form fields to disabled or readonly state by default; only enable individual fields when business rules require it
anti_pattern: Do not leave form fields editable in approval or view-only pages
notes: Applies to all approval and view-only page forms
